# format: html5-dom-v2

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Settings"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="h1" attrs=[]
        "Preferences"
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="form" attrs=[]
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="label" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="input" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="type" value="checkbox"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="checked" value=""}]
          " Email notifications"
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="label" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="input" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="type" value="checkbox"}]
          " Product updates"
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="label" attrs=[]
          "Language"
          element ns=html local="select" attrs=[]
            element ns=html local="option" attrs=[]
              "English"
            element ns=html local="option" attrs=[]
              "Nederlands"
        "\n"
      "\n"
